summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest passed (root, tokens/live with all sorts+filters, token detail with breakdown, ticker, KOL seed/add/dup/delete, kols/calls cross_calls, narratives=8, portfolio buy/positions/close/stats, alerts CRUD, settings GET/PUT). Frontend: Landing renders with hero, LAUNCH TERMINAL, live preview (6 rows). Dashboard shows 59 live token rows from DexScreener, sort-score & refresh-feed-button work, 59 quick-snipe buttons present and clickable. Narratives page renders 24 narrative cards (8 metas x cards). Portfolio shows positions and SVG charts. Settings page saves successfully and creates alert. KOL form input/add button work and POST succeeds.

ui_bugs.issue: Ticker marquee is rendered and visible (e.g. $LIVE / SOL strip) but the expected data-testid='ticker-marquee' is not present on the DOM node. Add data-testid='ticker-marquee' on the marquee container for testability.

After clicking quick-snipe-{symbol}, no toast/role=status element was detected in the DOM (toast count=0). The paper-buy POST likely succeeds (positions present in /app/portfolio with 2 rows), but user feedback toast is missing or detached. Verify sonner Toaster is mounted in layout and triggered on snipe.

Clicking the first <a href='/app/token/...'> from the dashboard did not navigate (URL remained /app). 109 such links exist but click is intercepted (likely outer row onClick or preventDefault). Token detail page (DexScreener iframe + score breakdown) could not be visually verified from clicking.

KOLWatchlist may not be rendering as a table (table tbody tr count=0 on /app/kol). Likely uses card/grid layout — backend /api/kols returns 6 default KOLs successfully. Add data-testid='kol-row-{handle}' on KOL cards for stable testing.

action_items: Add data-testid='ticker-marquee' to Ticker marquee container
Verify Toaster mounted at AppLayout root and that quick-snipe triggers toast.success on successful paper buy
Investigate why <a href='/app/token/...'> click does not navigate (possible row-level onClick swallowing event); ensure inner Link uses stopPropagation or row navigates correctly
Add data-testid='kol-row-{handle}' to KOL cards for testability
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 769 lines - consider splitting into routers (tokens, kols, portfolio, alerts, settings) for maintainability
compute_score: total may exceed component sum cap; bs_score formula could yield negatives if buy_ratio<0.4 — already clamped, good
Settings stores _id='global' string instead of ObjectId — fine, but using upsert in PUT and an insert in GET creates a small race; consider using only upsert
fetch_solana_pairs cache is process-local; under multiple workers each worker holds its own cache — acceptable for MVP
Hardcoded SOL price 180.0 in buy/close — flag as TODO for live SOL price feed
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ KOL (deleted), TEST_alert (deleted), and 1 portfolio position (left in DB). UI test created 1 KOL handle (testkol*) and 1 alert (TEST_ui_alert) and 1 paper-snipe position.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified end-to-end with real DexScreener responses. Frontend smoke tested across all 6 routes. Outstanding: token detail page (/app/token/{addr}) iframe & score breakdown not visually validated because dashboard token row link did not navigate on click — recheck by directly visiting /app/token/{address} after fix. Also revalidate snipe toast and ticker testid.
